Issue 02 · May 2026 Lisbon, Portugal

About this publication

Not a blog, not a vlog, not a series of posts. A proper thing — with pages, layout, and an editorial logic. A gratitude for the life I am living, and a feeling that I have some responsibility to share it. This is not about showing you the world. It is about showing you how I see it.
